variants.name: 异教徒
variants.ability: 一名邪恶玩家知道你是异教徒，如果他死于处决，你加入邪恶阵营。
variants.firstNightReminder: 唤醒一名邪恶玩家，对他指向异教徒玩家，并展示异教徒角色标记。

variants.name: 异教徒
variants.ability: 你拥有一个镇民角色的能力，如果这个镇民在场，他醉酒。如果你'疯狂'地证明你是异教徒，部分异教徒可能会死亡。［+0~2异教徒］

variants.name: 异教徒
variants.ability: 如果没有外来者存活，当晚除3名玩家以外的其他玩家全部死亡，即使你已死亡。
variants.otherNightReminder: If the Cultist has the "Apocalypse" reminder, mark 3 players with the "Survives" reminder. That night, every player who doesn't have the "Survives" reminder dies. If only 3 players live, remove the Cultist's "Apocalypse" reminder token. Remember that the Cultist keeps this ability even after dying.
variants.flavor: The ritual is too far gone to prevent it anymore. All I can do is warn those in it's wake.
